name: Black Spaghetti Alla Chitarra with Mussels, Chilis and Mint
recipeIngredient: 1 recipe black pasta, rolled out to thinnest setting
1 medium red onion, cut into julienne (1/8 inch)
2 pounds fresh Prince Edward Island mussels, scrubbed and debeaten
1 bunch mint leaves, approximately 1/2 cup packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Press sheets of black pasta through the chitarra and set aside.
2. Bring 6 quarts water to boil and add 2 tablespoons salt.
3. In a 12- to 14-inch sauté pan, heat olive oil until smoking.
4. Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
5. Add mussels, pepper, and white wine. Cover and cook until mussels have just opened, about 2 minutes.
6. Add tomato sauce and bring to boil.
7. Meanwhile, drop pasta in boiling water and cook until tender, about 1 minute.
8. Drain well and toss into pan with mussel mixture.
9. Add mint leaves, toss pasta to coat, and serve.
